            USER STORY:

            SEQUENCE DIAGRAM (PlantUML):
            @startuml

actor DMPSystem
database InstitutionalSystems

activate Researcher

Researcher -> DMPSystem: Start New DMP
DMPSystem -> InstitutionalSystems: Retrieve Existing Information
